LinkedIn-Project/postService/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK.
LinkedIn-Project/postService/pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project continues to compile and run against Java 17, failing to utilize Java 21 features or enforce Java 21 compatibility.

LinkedIn-Project/postService/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Lombok dependency to a version compatible with Java 21.
LinkedIn-Project/postService/pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions of Lombok may fail to compile or process annotations correctly on Java 21 due to internal API changes.

LinkedIn-Project/postService/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade ModelMapper dependency to a newer stable version.
Configure the Maven compiler plugin to use the release flag matching the java.version property.
LinkedIn-Project/postService/pom.xml.why_exists: Without this, the compiler might not enforce bytecode compatibility with Java 21, potentially causing runtime issues on the target JDK.

LinkedIn-Project/postService/src/main/ja.general_idea: Replace wildcard Lombok import with explicit imports for Getter, RequiredArgsConstructor, and Setter.
